description: Developing custom offensive security tools, conducting penetration testing, and contributing to open-source security projects. Focus on Windows and Linux exploitation, MITM attacks, and automation tooling.
Built multiple security tools including ZipCracker, RevChat, and TheListener. Specialized in creating user-friendly wrappers for complex security tools and MITM attack frameworks.
Focused on offensive security techniques, exploit development, and building custom payloads. Developed expertise in bypassing security controls and simulating advanced persistent threats.
